docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MANOV MUDALIER, BRANCH MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$125.00);ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTS SERVED: SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA FOR SERSONAL APPEARANCE & PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND THINGS AT TRIAL OR HEARING. SERVED AUG-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER RABOINE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP, REPRESENTED BY MANOV MUDALIER, BRANCH MANAGER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT AT THE STATE IF TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS AT 1:53 P.M. AND DEFENDANT IS NOTIFIED THAT THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY RABOINE, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO U.S. BANCORP
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
